## Summary

Speed-optimize the evaluation pipeline by raising concurrency and batch sizes across all phases. Eliminates most Phase 1A self-chain hops and doubles LLM concurrency in Phase 2.

**Expected impact for 111K-word novel (40 chunks):**
- Phase 1A: ~30s (was ~300-400s with 7 self-chain hops)
- Phase 2: ~90s (was ~150s at c=12)
- Total pipeline: ~10-15 min (was 45-60 min)

## Scope

**What this touches:**
- `lib/config/evaluationRuntimeConfig.ts` — Phase 1A config defaults and bounds
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/runPass1a.ts` — PASS1A_CHUNK_CONCURRENCY 10→20
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/runPass1.ts` — Pass 1 chunk concurrency 12→20
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/runPass2.ts` — Pass 2 chunk concurrency 12→20
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/runPass3Preflight.ts` — Pass 3A concurrency 4→10

**What it does NOT touch:**
- Evaluation logic, scoring, or quality
- Self-chain architecture (still exists for >40 chunk manuscripts)
- Vercel maxDuration (stays at 800s)
- Watchdog / orphan detection thresholds

### Phase 1A config changes

| Config | Old Default | New Default | Max |
|--------|-------------|-------------|-----|
| batchSize | 5 | 40 | 80 |
| concurrency | 3 | 5 | 10 |
| invocationBudgetMs | 45,000 | 240,000 | 600,000 |
| safetyMarginMs | 10,000 | 15,000 | 60,000 |
| preflightConcurrency | 2 | 3 | 10 |

### Concurrency changes

| Pass | Old | New | Notes |
|------|-----|-----|-------|
| Pass 1A (character sweep) | 10 | 20 | 2 rounds instead of 4 for 40 chunks |
| Pass 1 (craft execution) | 12 | 20 | Parallel with Pass 2: 40 total calls |
| Pass 2 (editorial insight) | 12 | 20 | Parallel with Pass 1: 40 total calls |
| Pass 3A (preflight map) | 4 | 10 | Faster preflight before synthesis |

### Rate limit math (Tier 4)
- 40 concurrent calls × 13,250 tokens/call = 530K burst TPM (5.3% of 10M limit)
- 40 RPM burst (0.4% of 10K RPM limit)

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- **Rate limit risk**: 40 concurrent LLM calls is aggressive but well within Tier 4 (10M TPM / 10K RPM). If rate limits change, EVAL_CHUNK_PASS_CONCURRENCY env var overrides.
- **Memory**: 40 chunk results in memory (~4MB) is fine for serverless functions.
- **Large manuscripts (>40 chunks)**: Still self-chain once at the 40-chunk boundary. A multi-batch loop is the logical follow-up but not needed for the common case.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: N/A — this directly modifies pipeline performance characteristics (config + concurrency). No scoring/quality changes.
